root_text.iti108:2.1: “Ye keci, bhikkhave, bhikkhū kuhā thaddhā lapā siṅgī unnaḷā asamāhitā, na me te, bhikkhave, bhikkhū māmakā.
root_text.iti108:2.2: Apagatā ca te, bhikkhave, bhikkhū imasmā dhammavinayā; na ca te imasmiṁ dhammavinaye vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjanti.
root_text.iti108:2.3: Ye ca kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhū nikkuhā nillapā dhīrā atthaddhā susamāhitā, te kho me, bhikkhave, bhikkhū māmakā.
root_text.iti108:2.4: Anapagatā ca te, bhikkhave, bhikkhū imasmā dhammavinayā; te ca imasmiṁ dhammavinaye vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjantī”ti.
root_text.iti108:5.1: Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.

translation_text.iti108:0.3: The Chapter on the Brahmin’s Offering of the Teaching
translation_text.iti108:1.1: This was said by the Buddha, the Perfected One: that is what I heard.
translation_text.iti108:2.1: “Mendicants, those mendicants who are deceivers and flatterers, pompous and fake, insolent and scattered: those mendicants are no followers of mine.
translation_text.iti108:2.2: They’ve left this teaching and training, and they don’t achieve growth, improvement, or maturity in this teaching and training.
translation_text.iti108:2.3: But those mendicants who are genuine, not flatterers, attentive, amenable, and serene: those mendicants are followers of mine.
translation_text.iti108:2.4: They haven’t left this teaching and training, and they do achieve growth, improvement, or maturity in this teaching and training.”
translation_text.iti108:3.1: “Those who are deceivers and flatterers, <j>pompous and fake,
translation_text.iti108:3.3: these don’t grow in the teaching
translation_text.iti108:3.4: that was taught by the perfected Buddha.
translation_text.iti108:4.1: But those who are genuine, not flatterers, attentive,
translation_text.iti108:4.3: these do grow in the teaching
translation_text.iti108:4.4: that was taught by the perfected Buddha.”
translation_text.iti108:5.1: This too is a matter that was spoken by the Blessed One: that is what I heard.

variant_text.iti108:2.2: na ca te → na ca te bhikkhave bhikkhū (bj, pts-vp-pli1, mr)
variant_text.iti108:2.4: imasmā dhammavinayā → imasmiṁ dhammavinaye (bj, mr) | imasmiṁ ca te dhammavinaye (sya-all)
